metadata.description: Cost ledger for AI-assisted development. Attributes every token, prompt-cache hit, and tool-use turn to the plugin / sub-plugin / agent tier that fired it. Forecasts spend, fires budget thresholds, surfaces cache waste. Phase 1 plugin #5.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. One install pulls in all 5 Pech sub-plugins via dependency resolution.

plugins.name: cost-tracker
plugins.description: L1 — Exponential Smoothing Forecast. Reads Claude API usage from every tool call, attributes via ENCHANTED_ATTRIBUTION env, writes monthly JSONL ledger. Forecasts session/day/month spend with ±2σ bands. Also owns L4 Cache-Waste Measurement.

plugins.name: budget-watcher
plugins.description: L2 — Budget Boundary Detection. Fires pech.budget.threshold.crossed at 50/80/100% per scope (session/hour/day/month, per agent tier, per model). Also owns L3 Z-Score Cost Anomaly detection.

plugins.name: rate-card-keeper
plugins.description: Holds the committed rate-card.json (per-model input/output rates, cache write 1.25×, cache read 0.1×, batch discount 0.5). Nightly CI refresh via GitHub Actions PR. Fires staleness warning at 90 days.

plugins.name: cost-query
plugins.description: Developer-facing query surface. /pech-cost, /pech-forecast, /pech-attribute, /pech-report slash commands. Opus orchestrator for anomaly triage.

plugins.name: nook-learning
plugins.description: L5 Gauss Learning (Pech). Per-developer spend-pattern accumulation across sessions. Builds weighted moving averages of cost-per-(skill, session_type, model) so anomaly detection has meaningful μ after the first 30 calls. Emu-A4 atomic serialization. Exports to shared/learnings.json for cross-plugin intelligence.
